name: Bright Starts Oball Easy-Grasp Rattle BPA-Free Infant Toy in Teal, Age Newborn and up, 4 Inches
bullets: Shake up playtime with the Oball Rattle by Bright Starts; rattle-version of the beloved Oball featuring an easy-grasp design loved for over 25 years
Grasp the flexible Oball for fine motor skill development and tactile stimulation; shake the ball to engage auditory senses and engage in exciting cause-and-effect play
Get baby moving with this chase-worthy toy that encourages crawling and gross motor development; keep baby entertained with multiple ways to play; one of the most beloved sensory toys for babies
Designed for little hands to hold; this lightweight Oball rattle is perfect for playtime at home, on the go, at the park, and more
Makes a great gift for baby showers, birthdays, and holidays; baby toys 0-6 months and up; over 16 million sold; fits in most diaper bags to easily add to collection of stroller toys
description: Get ready to shake, rattle, and roll with the Oball Rattle by Bright Starts! This bright pink baby rattle is designed to capture baby’s attention and provide multisensory play. The flexible and bendable Oball design makes it easy for tiny hands to grasp, supporting fine motor skill development. There’s no wonder we’ve sold over 16 million of them! Baby can shake the ball to stimulate auditory senses and enjoy exciting cause & effect play. Plus, baby will love the thrill of the chase... and working those gross motor skills, too! Whether at home or on the go, the Oball rattle is perfect for keep

reviews.name: Marin Jungbauer
reviews.title: An elegant and simple toy!
reviews.body: A fun and interactive toy, our three month old twins love playing with this ball! Easy for them to grasp and move around. Colorful and no small pieces for them to choke on. A nice and simple toy!

reviews.name: Meagan
reviews.title: Oball Baby Toy
reviews.body: Love this toy for babies!! Have purchased one for all three of our babies and multiple more for gifts. It’s very easy for baby to hold and light weight. Has small rattle noise when shaking. Easy to clean and is just a great toy for the price!!

reviews.name: Paige
reviews.title: A Classic Baby Toy That Kept My Daughter Entertained
reviews.body: This Oball was one of those simple toys that ended up getting a lot of use. The open design makes it very easy for little hands to grab, hold, and shake, even before they've developed strong fine motor skills.

reviews.name: Laura Acero
reviews.title: Fun and functional
reviews.body: Great sensory toy. It’s easy for my baby to grab and there are many ways you can play with it also with the shakers makes it even more fun for my baby it’s not loud is prefect . I’ve the color too!
